---
title: "CF-SNN — Car-Following Spiking Neural Network"
subtitle: "SNN + PINN · aggiornamento sui lavori"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [../_shared/theme/cf_dark.scss, cf_slim.scss]
---

{{< include _acts_slim/act1.qmd >}}

{{< include _acts_slim/act2.qmd >}}

{{< include _acts_slim/act3a.qmd >}}

{{< include _acts_slim/act3b.qmd >}}
